title: malcolmia littorea
intro: Malcolmia littorea, also known as sea stock or sea kale, is a biennial plant that thrives in coastal areas and is characterized by its edible leaves and stems. It is rich in medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which are known to soothe digestive issues and alleviate skin irritations. The health benefits of Malcolmia littorea include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Malcolmia littorea include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various ailments, with the leaves and stems typically being harvested during the plant's early stages of growth.
